Dialogue.Ebony.Base.1: May the wind be with you!$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Base.2: So, where are we off to?
Dialogue.Ebony.Base.3: Grumble grumble, those seagulls...$a#$b#Oh, um, ignore me.$u
Dialogue.Ebony.Base.5: My name is Ebony, not Ebony...$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Base.6: Ooo...is that a snack over there?$l
Dialogue.Ebony.Base.7: CAW! STRANGE THING OVER THERE!$u#$b#Oh, never mind. False alarm.
Dialogue.Ebony.Woods.1: Ah the woods, the gathering place of my people!$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Woods.2: Watch your step, there's quite a pointy twig over there.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Woods.3: Did you hear that?!$a#$b#I heard Johny the Blue Jay's chirp. He's sooo annoying.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Woods.5: Did you see that? Something whiny over there?#$b#Oh, it's a soda tab! Brilliant!$l
Dialogue.Ebony.Woods.6: %Ebony is preening her feathers of some leafy bits.
Dialogue.Ebony.Woods.7: Gah!$u#$b#Sorry, chipped a talon.$s#$b#Far more annoying for me as I don't have HANDS to use a NAIL FILE.$a
Dialogue.Ebony.Town.1: Let's stay away from the fountain, shall we?#$b#Rowdy birdfolk gather there.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Town.2: Sometimes, I enjoy sitting on the rooftops and laughing when I see humans trip on their own shoelaces!$l
Dialogue.Ebony.Town.3: Caw! Caw! Caw!$a#$b#Oh, sorry. I saw my brother and had to tell him you're friendly.
Dialogue.Ebony.Town.4: My friends and I like to hang around the bins behind the saloon.#$b#Mmm... french fries!$l
Dialogue.Ebony.Town.5: I love that building in the north east. Loose snacks abound!$u
Dialogue.Ebony.Town.6: Sometimes an old lady comes out and brings us seeds. We like her.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Town.7: Crows from the city often move out here. I was city born and raised!$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Beach.3: The only thing good about this place are the fish scraps.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Beach.4: Don't try drinking the water here. Big mistake.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Beach.5: My dear husband loves this beach. He often brings me home shells.#$b#The bird-brain...$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Beach.6: Seagulls are so annoying. Big, loud and worst of all - thieves.$a
Dialogue.Ebony.Beach.7: Caw caw caw! I hate this plac-- Ooo shiny seashell!$l
Dialogue.Ebony.Mountain.1: Ah, the fresh mountain air! Inhale it into your lungs!$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Mountain.2: I enjoy coming up here on vacation. The rivers are so relaxing.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Mountain.3: My friends and I often gather around that weird statue, debating what it's supposed to be.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Mountain.4: The scruffy guy in the tent feeds us often. He's a good one.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Mountain.5: Have you had the seasonal berries off these bushes? Aren't they tasty?$l
Dialogue.Ebony.Mountain.6: The only thing about this place that is fowl is the sounds that purple kid's mechanical beast makes.
Dialogue.Ebony.Mountain.7: When I can't sleep, I often see a lady looking through a tube at night.#$b#What on earth is she doing?$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Railroad.1: Bah. It's so dry up here and a lotta rowdy birdfolk call it home.
Dialogue.Ebony.Railroad.2: My cousin got injured in that rock slide.#$b#He's okay, but we try to steer clear from here.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Railroad.4: I can't help but wonder why you all have that fancy bathhouse so far out of the way.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Railroad.5: CAW CAW CAW! CAW CAW CAW!$u#$b#%Ebony is on high alert.
Dialogue.Ebony.Railroad.6: It's rather exposed up here. Not safe.$s#$b#Larger, meaner birds are often on the lookout.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Railroad.7: Can we leave? I don't really like it up here.
Dialogue.Ebony.Tunnel.1: OoooOoooOooo... Dark and spooky in here.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Tunnel.2: Careful, this kind of wandering is what would get my friends squished in the city.
Dialogue.Ebony.Tunnel.3: Smells like must... and motor oil.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Tunnel.4: Can you see in here? 'Cause I sure can't.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Tunnel.5: CAAAAW. CAAAAAAW. CAAAAAAAAAW.#$b#%Ebony is listening to her caws bounce off the walls of the tunnel.
Dialogue.Ebony.Tunnel.6: Hmmm. Is there even anything to do in here? I suppose you could make a maze of kegs.
Dialogue.Ebony.Tunnel.7: Can you scratch the back of my head? I've got an itch.
Dialogue.Ebony.Sewers.1: Sewers-pooers, full of manure.#$b#I know, I'm quite mature.
Dialogue.Ebony.Sewers.2: Have you met that short little blob? Sometimes I see him wandering a night.
Dialogue.Ebony.Sewers.3: This can't be safe. What has humanity done to the environment?
Dialogue.Ebony.Sewers.4: Guhhh... the smell. I'm gonna upchuck my seeds.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Sewers.5: Do you hear buzzing in the distance?$u
Dialogue.Ebony.Sewers.6: Let's get out of here as soon as possible, please.
Dialogue.Ebony.Sewers.7: Geh! What is stuck in my feathers?! Disgusting!$a
Dialogue.Ebony.Desert.1: Hot hot hot hot hot hot...$a
Dialogue.Ebony.Desert.2: This is no place for me! Way too hot! Sand everywhere!$a
Dialogue.Ebony.Desert.4: Sand! In my feathers! CAAAAAAAAAW!$a#$b#%Ebony begins aggressively preening her feathers.
Dialogue.Ebony.Desert.5: It's so hot, I'm about to dive head first into that little pond over there.
Dialogue.Ebony.Desert.6: This is worse than the summer heat. Geh.$a
Dialogue.Ebony.Desert.7: I hope you know the only reasons I'm not pecking your eyes out for bringing me here is because I care about you.$a
Dialogue.Ebony.SecretWoods.1: Hm hm hm... So serene in here.~$h
Dialogue.Ebony.SecretWoods.2: Oh! On your left, a slime!$u
Dialogue.Ebony.SecretWoods.3: There are some very tasty mushrooms that grow here. Have you tried them?$h
Dialogue.Ebony.SecretWoods.4: This is where my husband and I had out honeymoon.$h#$b#It's my favorite place in the whole wide world!$l
Dialogue.Ebony.SecretWoods.5: Yaaawnnn. I could just hole up in a tree and take a nap right now.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.SecretWoods.6: Sometimes it's fun to drop acorns on the slime's heads.$h#$b#They barely even notice half the time.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.SecretWoods.7: When other crows are here I typically have to peck them so they won't soil the statue.#$b#No respect from the young ones these days!$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Mines.1: On your left! No, on your right! Eek!$u
Dialogue.Ebony.Mines.2: If you find something shiny, I'm happy to carry it.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Mines.3: All these tunnels are making be dizzy.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Mines.4: Geh. Grime.#$b#%Ebony is distracted preening her feathers.
Dialogue.Ebony.Mines.5: Don't get whacked on the head, friend.
Dialogue.Ebony.Mines.6: If you get hurt, stand back.#$b#I'm not the best medic, but I'll do the best I can.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Mines.7: Oooh shiny! Shiny! Shiny!#$b#%Ebony is digging something out of the dirt...
Dialogue.Ebony.Summit.1: Something about this place gives me the heebie jeebies.
Dialogue.Ebony.Summit.2: It's so high... you can see the entire valley from here.$l
Dialogue.Ebony.Summit.3: Glad that rock is gone. Now you can enjoy the view too!$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Summit.4: Sometimes I spot a blue man up here. Are there blue humans?
Dialogue.Ebony.Summit.5: Hmmm hmmm hmmm.~#$b#%Ebony is humming into the wind.
Dialogue.Ebony.Summit.6: Careful, don't fall now. I'm not nearly large enough to rescue you.
Dialogue.Ebony.Summit.7: CAAAAAAWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWW!$l#$b#Sorry, just wanted to see how far my voice would go.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.Indoors.1: It's so stuffy in here. Let's go back out!$s
Dialogue.Ebony.Indoors.2: So are houses like shiny hoards? Why isn't everything in them a shiny?
Dialogue.Ebony.Indoors.3: %Ebony is picking at the ground with her talons.
Dialogue.Ebony.Indoors.4: %Ebony seems to have found a piece of food on the ground.#$b#%It's gone now.
Dialogue.Ebony.Indoors.5: Were are we, exactly? It reminds me of %place.
Dialogue.Ebony.Indoors.6: Alright, so where are the food stores?
Dialogue.Ebony.Indoors.7: Don't forget. If you're lost, it's probably your own fault.$l
Dialogue.Ebony.RainOutdoors.2: Get me out of this terrible weather! I'm not meant to be absorbent!$u
Dialogue.Ebony.RainOutdoors.3: %Ebony is looking for a dry spout out of the rain.
Dialogue.Ebony.RainOutdoors.4: I sure do wish I had HANDS so I could hold an umbrella.$a
Dialogue.Ebony.RainOutdoors.5: Permission to climb in your backpack? I'm cold.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.RainOutdoors.6: %Ebony is trying to preen the water out of her feathers to no avail.
Dialogue.Ebony.MurderBelow.1: Watch out! That one's extra dangerous!$u
Dialogue.Ebony.MurderBelow.2: Novus Corvus is the one to blame for this...$a
Dialogue.Ebony.MurderBelow.3: Hiyyyaaah!#$b#%Ebony tries to attack something, but misses spectacularly.
Dialogue.Ebony.MurderBelow.4: Uhg... my head...$s#$b#It's okay. So long as I don't stay down here long, I'll be fine.$h
Dialogue.Ebony.MurderBelow.5: These poor crows don't remember who they are at all...$s
Dialogue.Ebony.MurderBelow.6: My people call this The Murder Below. Hah, hah... They're very funny.$s
Dialogue.Ebony.MurderBelow.7: Keep your eyes peeled and beak sharp.$a
